title: Lululemon: Ignore The Margin Compression Talk
text: Lululemon Athletica Inc.'s calendar year margin compression is due to variable costs that will probably adjust lower this year. Additionally, many analysts mistake 'monetized costs' such as excess amortization for cash costs. The company marked down its prices in 2022. However, it gained further market share, and its "exclusive pricing" strategy could resurface in 2023 amid an improved macroeconomic outlook.
